description: Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal are what we love about the brand senorita. Subtle hues, super soft footbed styling and a classic design with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DetailsRed sandal with synthetic upper, has a forefoot strap and an ankle strap fastened by a velcro closureBrown soft footbed with branding on the heelTPU outsole with patterned grooves and a wedge heelHeel: 3"Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
